notes: The http adaptor is a generic REST/HTTP client (request, get, post, put, patch, del, parseXML) with no fixed upstream API. Synthesized a conventional RESTful resource collection (/resources and /resources/{id} with GET/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) so mocker has a reusable Resource shape to seed. Server URL is a mock placeholder; the Resource schema uses additionalProperties because concrete fields depend on whatever API the adaptor is pointed at.
